pageContext.name: Admiral Ackbar 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Admiral Ackbar™ has arrived!  Ackbar was an intelligent and courageous military commander who served for the Rebel Alliance™ and New Republic™. Regarded as a brilliant tactician, he has gained a prominent fan following over the years.   This fourteenth release in the Star Wars™ Chibi Coin collection is made from 1oz pure silver, which has been shaped and colored to represent Admiral Ackbar™ as Chibi art. It showcases his distinct fish-like features as he strikes an authoritative pose. To confirm it is legal tender, the obverse bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II.   Officially licensed, the coin is placed inside a specially designed case, molded to the coin's shape, for protection. The case itself is stored inside a Star Wars-themed box, which features vivid images of Ackbar and includes a large window for display. A Certificate of Authenticity is printed on the back of the box, along with coin's unique number in the limited mintage of only 2,000 coins.   Harness the strength and courage of this great leader. Order yours today!
